title: Pushing My AI Dark Factory to Its Limits with Opus + Kimi Combined
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates an AI Dark Factory, a self-building codebase that deploys code through custom agent workflows, scaled by combining Claude Opus for deep reasoning tasks with Kimi K2.6 for implementation and validation. The approach optimizes token efficiency by routing complex reasoning to stronger models only where needed.
